message:
🐛 fix: show Demo badge in multi-tenancy detail modals when card uses demo data (#2899)

Each modal now receives isDemoData from its parent card hook and
displays a yellow "Demo" StatusBadge in the modal header when the
data is demo/fallback. Matches the card-level demo indicator pattern.

All 5 modals updated: OVN, KubeFlex, K3s, KubeVirt, Multi-Tenancy Overview.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
